title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.task: Discuss the following initiatives that governments could introduce to reduce inequality in society, then decide which two would be the most effective.

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some initiatives that governments could introduce to reduce inequality in society.
Now decide which two initiatives would most effectively reduce inequality in society.
